hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Best Friends Day, Hairspray is a movie that celebrates friendship, love, and acceptance, following the story of plus-sized teenager Tracy Turnblad as she navigates her way through high school and the local dance scene.
hero.blurb: This musical comedy is full of energy, great music, and outstanding performances. With its uplifting message and fun dance numbers, Hairspray is a movie that will leave you smiling and feeling good.

released.title: Ocean's Thirteen
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Ocean's Thirteen is the third installment in the Ocean's franchise, providing plenty of laughs, twists, and turns as the crew seeks revenge against a ruthless casino owner.
released.blurb: With an all-star cast, including George Clooney, Brad Pitt, and Matt Damon, this heist movie is full of clever one-liners and entertaining action sequences. While it may not be the strongest in the series, Ocean's Thirteen still offers a fun and lighthearted viewing experience.

birthday.title: Kindergarten Cop
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Frank Whaley, Kindergarten Cop is a classic comedy that showcases his acting skills as a detective who goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher.
birthday.blurb: This funny and heartwarming movie is a great example of Arnold Schwarzenegger's ability to play a comedic role, and it's a must-see for families and fans of the actor. With its lighthearted humor and entertaining storyline, Kindergarten Cop is a great choice for a family movie night.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its confusing plot, poor acting, and ridiculous twists, making it a prime example of a movie that's so bad it's good.
awful.blurb: With a convoluted storyline and cringe-worthy performances, I Know Who Killed Me is a movie that will leave you scratching your head and wondering what the filmmakers were thinking. However, its inadvertent humor and entertainingly bad moments make it a guilty pleasure for fans of campy cinema.
